description_long: This is a clear plastic cup filled with a light brown, milky beverage, characteristic of classic bubble tea. The cup is topped with a transparent domed lid, through which a wide, straight, dark purple straw is inserted vertically. At the bottom of the cup, several dark, spherical tapioca pearls are visible, clustered together. The drink appears smooth and slightly creamy, with the pearls providing a contrasting texture and color. The cup is unbranded and has no visible logos or printed designs, giving it a clean, minimalist appearance. The overall look is typical of takeaway bubble tea drinks found in urban cafes and street vendors.
description: A clear plastic cup of light brown bubble tea with a domed lid, wide purple straw, and visible tapioca pearls at the bottom.
description_view_0: Front view showing the clear cup, domed lid, purple straw, and a cluster of tapioca pearls at the bottom.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view with the cup, lid, and straw visible; tapioca pearls are partially visible at the bottom edge.
description_view_2: Back view with the cup, lid, and straw; tapioca pearls are most clearly visible at the bottom.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the cup, lid, and straw; fewer tapioca pearls are visible from this angle.
attribute_straw_type: wide, straight plastic straw, dark purple in color, no distinctive features
attribute_cup_lid_style: domed, transparent plastic lid with a central straw slot
